projects.Title: Reed College Maintenance Hole Rehab
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Sewer bypass design
Maintenance hole design
Permitting
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans was the prime consultant providing civil engineering services for this maintenance hole rehabilitation project in Portland, OR. The maintenance hole, located in a sensitive natural area on the Reed College campus adjacent to Crystal Springs, had eroded resulting in water discharge from the bottom. After several failed sealing attempts, the team designed to plug, line, and abandon the existing hole and construct a new hole outside the natural area, including temporary sewer bypass, complex permitting, and construction support.

projects.Title: Capitol Highway Stormwater Improvements
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Legal descriptions
Topographic basemap and basemapping
Retaining walls
Stormwater facilities
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Nationwide Engineering Plans provided mapping and structural services for this joint stormwater and transportation improvement project along SW Capitol Highway in Portland, OR. Scope included topographic basemap and basemapping, legal descriptions, new stormwater system improvements at multiple corridor locations, and retaining wall design.

projects.Title: Marquis Eugene Senior Living
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading
Storm sewer design
Domestic fire and water service
Parking lot
Stormwater raingardens/planters
Retaining walls
3D mapping
Boundary and Topographic basemap
Construction staking
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans documented, designed, and managed this multi-building and multi-phased development with 76 senior housing units as well as an assisted-living and memory care center on a 12-acre vacant lot in Eugene, OR. This 4-phased project includes a 3-story, 99,000 sq ft assisted-living and memory care building; 44 independent living townhouses for seniors; 30 duplex cottage units; and a community center with a gym, pool, cafe, and other site amenities. Site improvements consisted of relocation of existing site access to 2 commercial driveways and design of private infrastructure including grading, storm, sewer, domestic fire and water service, parking lot, stormwater raingardens/planters, and retaining wall. Field documentation included full boundary and Topographic basemap, providing record information for the design of the site, and construction staking. Additionally, Our geomatics staff provided 3D mapping for machine control used by the contractor on site.

projects.Title: Cedar Commons
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Utility design
Stormwater design
Erosion control plans
Site grading and drainage
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans provided civil engineering services for this 3-story, 60-unit apartment complex on a largely vacant 1-acre parcel in Sacramento, CA. The building consists of 40 single-room occupancy units and 20 studio units targeted to people exiting homelessness. The site includes a 22-space parking lot, courtyard, landscaped facilities, bike parking, and two drywells for stormwater runoff. The site also has offices for counseling, group kitchens on each floor, community space, and laundry. A local housing services partner provides intensive on-site wraparound services for residents, including crisis prevention, mental health services, and employment support.

projects.Title: Pruner Rd/Industrial Way Traffic Control
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Topographic basemap documentation
Utility location
ROW resolution
projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Nationwide Engineering Plans provided mapping and documentation for this intersection improvement project in Myrtle Creek, OR. Tasks included topographic basemap documentation, utility location, and right-of-way resolution to support traffic control and roadway design.

projects.Title: Portland Japanese Garden
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Boundary resolution
Topographic and as-built documentation
Utility location
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans is providing field documentation services for this 12-acre garden in the forested hills of SW Portland, helping create a comprehensive site map that will help facilitate the planning and communication necessary to effectively support the continued growth, changes, and challenges inherent in maintaining the space.

projects.Title: Cedar Hills Topo documentation
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Topographic basemap
ROW location
Utility location
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans performed field documentation services for this infiltration-and-inflow sewer rehabilitation project within an approximately 30-acre subdivision in Irvine, CA. The goal was to locate existing sewer mains, lateral connections, and elevations. Scope included topographic basemap and base mapping of project right-of-way, building corners, low points on buildings, and utilities.

projects.Title: I-205: Stafford Road to OR99E Corridor Road Widening
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Control network
Topographic basemap & mapping
DTM
ROW resolution

Scope supported widening to three northbound and three southbound through lanes from the Stafford Road interchange to OR 213, including control network, DTM development, and ROW resolution.

projects.DESCRIPTION: As prime consultant, Nationwide Engineering Plans provided topographic and 3D mapping documentation for this on-call paving and safety project along a designated urban corridor in Seattle, WA. Scope included pavement restoration along the project limits and updating intersections that did not meet current ADA standards.

Cost estimating
Street geometry & ROW
Ped/Bike/ADA

projects.DESCRIPTION: As prime consultant, Nationwide Engineering Plans provided engineering services for this multimodal safety project in Austin, TX. The team delivered improved bicycle and pedestrian access, greenway connections, and safer crossings along the corridor. Improvements included a dedicated mid-block crossing, ADA- and AASHTO-compliant safety enhancements, maintained bike and pedestrian access during construction, continuous sidewalk segments where feasible, and creative stormwater solutions.

projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans was the prime consultant for installation of protective screening on five highway overpasses in the Columbus, OH area to improve motorist safety by preventing objects thrown from above and to bring structures into compliance with current standards. Scope included project management, PS&E development, structural design for fence mounting, and staging, traffic control, and temporary traffic management plans.

Scope included highway design, PS&E development, utility coordination, and traffic control plans, plus management of structural and railroad coordination subconsultants to improve pavement conditions and durable striping.

projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans is providing construction management services to bring existing ADA curb ramps into compliance across the Bronx, NY. Staff perform constructability and traffic control reviews, manage agency inspectors, review field work, provide field support, and resolve issues as needed. The team also addresses contract change orders, coordinates with other city departments, issues punch lists, and closes out projects with payment and completion documentation.

projects.Title: Construction Inspection Support
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Oversee contractor compliance
Manage changes
Maintain documents
Review and recommend changes to design plan
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans provided construction inspection support during a municipal summer construction season in New York, NY. Assignments included a Safe Routes to School safety upgrade with ADA curb ramps, flashing beacons, street lighting, a new traffic signal, and asphalt concrete paving—plus a park trail renovation with updated lighting in sensitive habitat areas. Services included daily inspection, quantity verification, material certification, and review of contractor deliverables.

projects.DESCRIPTION: New construction of modern duplex condos in San Diego, CA. Each unit is approximately 2,500 sq ft with four bedrooms and four baths, including separate living quarters. Photo permission granted by Keller Williams.

Construction replaced the prior facility with a modern, 87,200 sq ft, two-story building serving approximately 750 students. Scope included public frontage improvements, construction inspection, stormwater treatment facilities, plans/specs/estimates, and easement documentation.

projects.Title: Balch Creek Trash Rack Retrofit
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Project management
Permitting with local, state, and federal agencies
Construction documents to include Plans, Specs & Estimates
Utility coordination
Trail realignment
Foundation, grading, and ADA accessible sidewalk design
projects.DESCRIPTION: As the prime consultant, Nationwide Engineering Plans is providing project management and civil design services for this in-stream restoration project that is a key feature of Portland Parks & Recreation’s Macleay Park. The existing trash racks and bays keep the majority of sediment, rock, and floating debris from entering the low-pressure storm sewer that conveys Balch Creek from Forest Park to the Willamette River.

projects.Title: Enhanced Transit Corridors
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED: Conceptual planning
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans supported conceptual planning for an Enhanced Transit Corridors program in New York, NY aimed at improving bus speed and reliability along priority arterials. Several corridors were identified for dedicated transit improvements, signal priority, and safer pedestrian access. Our team translated corridor priorities into buildable street and utility assumptions for later design phases.

projects.Title: Spring Garden Park
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Site utility plan
Grading
Construction documents
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans joined the project team as a subconsultant for redevelopment of an approximately 4.65-acre neighborhood park in Denver, CO. Our role included design of a site utility plan with sanitary sewer and water services for the restroom facility, water feature, and drinking fountains, plus grading and construction documents.

projects.Title: PBOT Tunnel Illumination Upgrades
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:

projects.DESCRIPTION: As a subconsultant, Nationwide Engineering Plans provided mapping and documentation to support tunnel illumination upgrades at four Portland, OR facilities: Rocky Butte Tunnel, Burnside Tunnel, Cornell Tunnels, and Naito Parkway Tunnel. Field documentation captured portal heights, tunnel high points, curb-line wall elevations, and utilities between tunnel portals and electrical service locations.

projects.Title: PBOT ADA Curb Ramp Replacement Program
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:

projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans is a subconsultant on Portland, OR ADA curb ramp programs covering inventory, assessment, and design of more than 1,000 ramps over five years. Many ramps are designed using PBOT streamlined in-the-field layout methods for pre-selected qualifying areas.

Nationwide Engineering Plans provided designs for roadside improvements along a ¼-mile section of McLoughlin Blvd. in Milwaukie; structural design for multiple retaining walls; and sidewalk improvements on the north side of SE Powell Boulevard from the rail over pass to SE 20th Avenue.

projects.Title: Large Scale Sewer Rehabilitation
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:

projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans provided utility design, CAD, and field documentation on five separate projects within a large-scale sewer rehabilitation program in Queens, NY. Objectives included increasing sewer capacity and reducing risks of street flooding and sanitary sewer overflows. Design services covered condition assessment, rehabilitation method alternatives, and small-diameter pipe design. CAD deliverables included plan-and-profile sheets, revised alignments, spot repairs, and replacement graphics. Field work included ROW documentation, topographic basemap for design, field investigations, verification of rehabilitation methods, and utility as-built documentation prepared to agency drafting standards.

documentation
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans supported land development for this 80-lot subdivision in Charleston, SC, including sewer, stormwater, potable water, roadway, and sidewalk design. Challenges included bioswale design and a soft-surface trail adjacent to a wetland buffer, with clearing minimized to protect existing vegetation.

projects.Title: Westparc at North Bethany
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED:
Grading design
Erosion control design
Stormwater/wastewater/potable water design
Parking lot and sidewalk design
Full street improvement
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans was the civil engineering consultant for this 3-acre mixed-use development in Frisco, TX, including 149 apartment units and 11,000 sq ft of commercial space. Deliverables included onsite and offsite construction documents for grading, erosion control, stormwater, wastewater, potable water, parking, sidewalks, and full street improvements.

projects.Title: Tryon Creek State Park
projects.SERVICES PROVIDED: On site stormwater management
projects.DESCRIPTION: Nationwide Engineering Plans was the prime consultant for driving-surface rehabilitation at Tryon Creek State Park in Lake Oswego, OR. Because impervious surface work triggered drainage treatment requirements, the team met water-quality standards using pervious pavers and drain rock storage beneath parking areas—avoiding foreign infrastructure while supporting infiltration within the park setting.
